summary.key_theme: Quanta Services 憑藉在數據中心與基礎設施領域的強勁技術動能與成長表現，持續獲得市場高度關注與看多評級。

bullish.title: 1 Data Center Stock That’s More Than Doubled Over the Past Year
bullish.reason: 該公司作為數據中心基礎設施的關鍵參與者，過去一年股價翻倍，顯示其在 AI 與雲端基礎設施需求下的強勁成長潛力。

bullish.title: Quanta Services Inc (NYSE:PWR) Shows High Technical and Setup Ratings Ahead of Potential Breakout
bullish.reason: 技術面顯示該股處於強勁上升趨勢，且具備高品質的盤整型態，被視為潛在的突破候選標的。

bullish.title: Quanta Services Inc (NYSE:PWR) Passes the 'Caviar Cruise' Screen for Quality Investing
bullish.reason: 符合高品質投資篩選標準，強調其在基礎設施領域的領導地位及高資本回報率。

bullish.title: Is Quanta Services, Inc. (PWR) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
bullish.reason: 市場出現看多觀點，分析師對於該公司在當前市場環境下的投資價值持正面態度。

bullish.title: Quanta Services Stock: Is PWR Outperforming the Industrial Sector?
bullish.reason: 過去一年表現優於工業板塊，顯示其相對於同業的強勢競爭力。

bullish.title: Quanta Services Inc. stock outperforms competitors on strong trading day
bullish.reason: 在交易日中表現優於競爭對手，反映市場對其短期股價動能的認可。

bullish.title: Quanta Services (PWR) Increases Despite Market Slip: Here's What You Need to Know
bullish.reason: 在市場整體疲軟時逆勢上漲 1.04 %，展現出良好的抗跌性與買盤支撐。

bearish.title: Quanta Services (PWR) Dips More Than Broader Market: What You Should Know
bearish.reason: 股價單日下跌 3.9 %，跌幅超過大盤，反映短期獲利了結賣壓。

neutral.title: Quanta Services Announces Quarterly Cash Dividend
neutral.reason: 宣布發放季度現金股利，屬於例行性財務活動，對股價影響有限。

neutral.title: Quanta Services (PWR) Valuation Check After Strong Multi‑Period Share Price Gains
neutral.reason: 針對股價大幅上漲後的估值檢視，屬於中性的市場觀察報告，未給出明確買賣建議。

neutral.title: Is Quanta Services, Inc. (PWR) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
neutral.reason: 與 Yahoo 報導內容重複，作為市場觀點彙整，提供投資人參考資訊。
